Class Rabbit

java.lang.Object
shelter.domain.Animal
shelter.domain.Rabbit
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<Animal>
public class Rabbit extends Animal
Represents a rabbit available for adoption at a shelter. In addition to the base Animal attributes, a rabbit has a fur length classification that may be relevant for adopters with grooming preferences or allergies.

    Description
    static enum 
    Rabbit.FurLength
    Represents the fur length of a rabbit.

  • Constructor Details

    • Rabbit

      public Rabbit(String id, String name, String breed, LocalDate birthday, ActivityLevel activityLevel, boolean vaccinated, String adopterId, String shelterId, Rabbit.FurLength furLength)
      Reconstruction constructor for deserializing a Rabbit from persistent storage. This constructor preserves the original id and all fields including the fur length, allowing exact round-trip restore from CSV data.
      Parameters:
      id - the pre-existing unique identifier; must not be null or blank
      name - the rabbit's name; must not be null or blank
      breed - the rabbit's breed; must not be null or blank
      birthday - the rabbit's date of birth; must not be null
      activityLevel - the rabbit's activity level; must not be null
      vaccinated - whether the rabbit has been vaccinated
      adopterId - the ID of the adopter, or null if not adopted
      shelterId - the ID of the shelter, or null if unassigned
      furLength - the rabbit's fur length; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if furLength is null or any Animal parameter is invalid

    • Rabbit

      public Rabbit(String name, String breed, LocalDate birthday, ActivityLevel activityLevel, boolean vaccinated, Rabbit.FurLength furLength)
      Constructs a new Rabbit with the given attributes. All parameters are required and validated at construction time.
      Parameters:
      name - the rabbit's name; must not be null or blank
      breed - the rabbit's breed; must not be null or blank
      birthday - the rabbit's date of birth; must not be null
      activityLevel - the rabbit's activity level; must not be null
      vaccinated - whether the rabbit has been vaccinated
      furLength - the rabbit's fur length; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if furLength is null or any Animal parameter is invalid

    • Rabbit

      public Rabbit(Rabbit other)
      Copy constructor that creates a new Rabbit with all field values copied from other. Inherits base Animal fields via Animal(Animal) and copies Rabbit-specific fields.
      Parameters:
      other - the Rabbit instance to copy; must not be null

  • Method Details

    • getSpecies

      public Species getSpecies()
      Returns the species of this animal. Each concrete subclass must return its own immutable Species constant.
      Specified by:
      getSpecies in class Animal
      Returns:
      the Species of this animal

    • getFurLength

      public Rabbit.FurLength getFurLength()
      Returns the fur length of this rabbit.
      Returns:
      the rabbit's Rabbit.FurLength
